appliedUpdates.description: Added Frontend Routes Testing section with Flow Validator Guidance
Documented frontend runs on port 4127 (not 5173 as in .env.example)

frictions.description: agent-browser daemon failed to start due to port conflict
frictions.resolution: Used Playwright directly via Node.js script instead of agent-browser CLI

frictions.description: super_admin user cannot access /librarian/* routes (ProtectedRoute restricts to librarian role only)
frictions.resolution: Used librarian user for testing librarian routes
